      I had to slightly heat and bend the unit to make it so it touches the sander's frame correctly. works well now.
    • 7***2 (553)- Feedback left by buyer.
      Past year
      Verified purchase
      Thank you for an amazing product! This thing is quality made for sure. It's a perfect fit for my work sharp, for the price I can't see any reason for buying it out arrived brand new and looks great!
